Title: Career Clarity
Description: A short assessment to help learners reflect on career goals, strengths, and next steps toward clarity.
SchemaJson: {"id":"career_clarity_v1","title":"Career Clarity","version":"1.0","questions":[{"id":"q1","type":"choice","label":"Where are you right now in your career journey?","options":["Exploring options","Starting out","Growing skills","Changing direction","Established"],"required":true},{"id":"q2","type":"rating","label":"How clear are your career goals?","min":1,"max":5,"required":true},{"id":"q3","type":"text","label":"What is one concrete next step you could take in the next month?","required":true},{"id":"q4","type":"text","label":"Any other notes about your career priorities?","required":false}]}
